_description: Replaces routeToAmandaDrafts. Processes AMANDA/QUEUE/* emails, builds AMANDA_TASK JSON, creates drafts, handles HITL gates.
name: OpenClaw: Amanda Queue Router

nodes.name: Amanda Push Webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered when Amanda receives new email (from JR router or external).

nodes.name: Get Queue Messages
nodes.notes: Fetch unprocessed queue items from Amanda's inbox.

nodes.name: Parse Task Type
nodes.notes: Parses the [ACTION] tag from subject and builds structured AMANDA_TASK payload.

nodes.name: Call AI Backend

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ role: 'system', content: 'You are Amanda, an AI executive assistant for Javier Rabinovich at Prive Group, a real estate development firm.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.amandaTask) }]) }}

nodes.notes: Sends task to AI backend for processing. Configure with OpenAI, Claude, or on-prem LLM endpoint.

nodes.name: Create Gmail Draft
nodes.notes: Creates draft with AI analysis for JR to review.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Notification

parameters.text:
={{ '📋 Amanda processed: ' + $json.taskType + '

Subject: ' + ($json.subject || '').substring(0, 80) + '
Priority: ' + $json.priority + '

Draft ready for review in Gmail.' }}

nodes.notes: Notifies JR via Telegram when a task is processed.

nodes.name: Log to Sheet
nodes.notes: Logs every processed task to Google Sheets for audit trail.

nodes.name: Update Labels
nodes.notes: Move from QUEUE to PROCESSED state.
